title: OpenClaw Sub Agents and ACPX (OpenClaw Business Automation Setup)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates OpenClaw running business automation tasks on a Raspberry Pi, including GitHub-based agent synchronization, knowledge base management, and ACPX-enabled Claude Code sub-agent deployment. The video compares multi-agent orchestration against single-agent workflows for content pipeline automation.
